movie_catalog.title: Sweet Rogue Killer
movie_catalog.original_title: Sweet Rogue Killer 'SRK' : The Killer's Game
movie_catalog.overview: After destroying the Forelli empire, SRK discovers that the last surviving Forelli bloodline is secretly rebuilding its power through corruption and political influence. As a dangerous conspiracy threatens the township once again, SRK launches a final mission to expose the truth, eliminate the heir, and end the Forelli legacy forever.

movie_catalog.title: Arjunan Per Paththu
movie_catalog.overview: Arjunan, who witnessed his parents being killed by lightning in front of his eyes, cannot bear the shock and arrives in Chennai from his hometown Madurai. Arjunan, who joined a kayalang shop in Chennai, starts to love a woman. Before marrying that woman, he was a worker and wanted to become an entrepreneur. He gave away all the money he had saved up until then and bought an old Tata Ace and married the woman he loved. Arjuna happily starts driving the vehicle, thinking that his life has become as happy as he thought it would be. Arjuna, who has been facing constant problems with that old vehicle, realizes that he has been completely cheated in buying the vehicle. He brings together all those who have been affected like him and exposes all the frauds in buying and selling old vehicles, seeking justice for himself and all those who have been cheated like him.

movie_catalog.title: Arulvaan
movie_catalog.overview: Follows Muthuvel, a resolute collector who overcomes all obstacles to educate a tribal girl and provide school access for the entire forest community.

movie_catalog.title: Idhayam Murali
movie_catalog.overview: A young man navigates the complexities of unrequited love, finding that even as years pass and life takes unexpected turns, certain emotions remain deeply embedded in his heart.

movie_catalog.title: Love Oh Love
movie_catalog.overview: A couple is in love. One partner's excessive spending pushes the other into debt. When the burdened partner decides to seek a divorce, the other files a police complaint through the leader of a women's association. As they begin living together, they gradually understand each other's struggles. Eventually, they reconcile and choose to continue their life together.

movie_catalog.title: Lakshmikanthan Kolai Vazhakku
movie_catalog.overview: A young man convicted of murder awaits execution, while a conflicted judge, an aging hangman, and a morally torn jailer confront the weight of justice, guilt, and humanity in the final hours before dawn.

movie_catalog.title: Unsaid
movie_catalog.overview: After missing the chance to express his feelings, a young aspiring writer begins crafting the story he wishes he had lived. As fiction, UNSAID explores love, regret, and the quiet weight of words left unspoken.

movie_catalog.title: Gatta Kusthi 2
movie_catalog.overview: Picks up after the first film, with Veera and Keerthi balancing parenthood and Keerthi's wrestling career, featuring a role reversal where Veera takes on more domestic responsibilities.

movie_catalog.title: Find Me
movie_catalog.overview: During the COVID-19 lockdown, a series of mysterious murders spreads fear across the city. As the investigation unfolds, hidden secrets and unexpected twists make it increasingly difficult to identify the killer. Every clue leads to another mystery in this Tamil crime thriller.

movie_catalog.title: Con City
movie_catalog.overview: Follows a struggling family whose lives change when a receipt printer starts generating money after a lightning strike, leading to public chaos when society discovers the money-making machine.

movie_catalog.title: Heartin
movie_catalog.overview: Fate tosses a couple into an unexpected situation with an ex-girlfriend in the mix.

movie_catalog.title: Angikaaram
movie_catalog.overview: Inspired by true events, this film follows the journey of a man who has had enough, fights for recognition against a system shaped strictly by politics and power.

movie_catalog.title: Suitcased
movie_catalog.overview: When a struggling student discovers his late father left him a locked pendrive containing a massive fortune in Bitcoin, he and his friends must crack a highly secure password with only one attempt remaining—unknowingly holding the key to a long-buried family secret.

movie_catalog.title: Dark Giant
movie_catalog.overview: Dark Giant is a Supernatural Horror and Psychological Family Drama. It Explores How Greed, Guilt, and Generational Trauma Can Manifest as a Literal Curse, Destroying a Family From the Inside Out

movie_catalog.title: Nooru Sami
movie_catalog.overview: Selvi, a widowed mother, devotes her life to raising her two sons in a conservative village. Years later, unfulfilled life comes back into focus, challenging deep-rooted traditions. As family and society strongly oppose change, Selvi must choose between societal expectations and her own happiness.

movie_catalog.title: Double Occupancy
movie_catalog.overview: Rajini transforms between woman by day and man by night, hiding this gender swap from partners creating tangled complications.

movie_catalog.title: Habeebi
movie_catalog.overview: Follows a boy and girl in a Muslim neighbourhood in southern Tamil Nadu whose romance divides their community.

movie_catalog.title: Moondram Kan
movie_catalog.overview: Follows the investigation of a factory general manager's murder, where four workers—a mechanic, assistant manager, owner, and new recruit—become the primary suspects.

movie_catalog.title: Valluvan
movie_catalog.overview: When a string of high-profile murders rocks the city, investigators uncover a dark secret linking the victims to an unspeakable crime. But even after the alleged killer is caught, the killings don’t stop—revealing a far deeper conspiracy where justice comes at a deadly price.

movie_catalog_history.title: Idhayam Murali
movie_catalog_history.overview: A young man navigates the complexities of unrequited love, finding that even as years pass and life takes unexpected turns, certain emotions remain deeply embedded in his heart.

movie_catalog_history.title: Karuppu
movie_catalog_history.overview: In a world where justice falters, guardian deity Vettai Karuppu takes the guise of a lawyer to battle a corrupt legal system preying on the powerless.

movie_catalog_history.title: Parimala and Co
movie_catalog_history.overview: A dark comedy centered around a chaotic family whose tangled relationships and unpredictable situations lead to emotionally charged and absurd moments, blending humor with underlying tension and drama.

movie_catalog_history.title: Blast
movie_catalog_history.overview: A seemingly ordinary family must unleash their hidden martial arts skills when they clash with a ruthless criminal gang tied to corruption and violence.

movie_catalog_history.title: Kara
movie_catalog_history.overview: A thief tries to go straight, but when predatory banks trap his father in debt, he returns to crime — with a determined cop closing in on his trail.

movie_catalog_history.title: Gatta Kusthi 2
movie_catalog_history.overview: Picks up after the first film, with Veera and Keerthi balancing parenthood and Keerthi's wrestling career, featuring a role reversal where Veera takes on more domestic responsibilities.

movie_catalog_history.title: Gandhi Talks
movie_catalog_history.overview: A silent black comedy, about the monetary needs of a character & how it impacts the others. A young, unemployed graduate Mahadev’s struggle to land a job through any means possible and crosses paths with a businessman and petty thief. A subject wherein silence speaks much louder than words. Although a work of fiction by the writer, all the characters in the film are sketched out to seem very real and relatable ensuring an enriching journey as well a laugh riot as the cat and mouse guffaws amongst them unfold. Gandhi Talks aims at telling a story by switching off the device of dialogue, which is not only scary but also interesting and challenging.

movie_catalog_history.title: Thaai Kizhavi
movie_catalog_history.overview: An elderly and feared moneylender from a village near Madurai falls seriously ill, prompting her estranged sons and extended family to reunite after years of separation. As tensions rise inside the household, hidden motives, family conflicts, and expectations over her wealth turn her uncertain condition into the center of a chaotic family drama.

movie_catalog_history.title: Youth
movie_catalog_history.overview: Youth follows Praveen, a 15-year-old boy who enters adolescence determined to find true love before school ends. As he goes through multiple relationships and heartbreaks, he slowly begins to understand what love truly means. Along the way, the experiences shape his growth, maturity, and outlook on life.

movie_catalog_history.title: TN 2026
movie_catalog_history.overview: Set in Pollachi, the story follows a powerful landlord, Sivalingam Mandradiyar, who becomes obsessed with a rising actor, Kukanth Kumar, believing he is the next M.G.R. He pours his wealth into shaping the actor's career and political future. But as ambition and fame grow, so does the risk of downfall. Will it lead to power or ruin?

movie_catalog_history.title: Find Me
movie_catalog_history.overview: During the COVID-19 lockdown, a series of mysterious murders spreads fear across the city. As the investigation unfolds, hidden secrets and unexpected twists make it increasingly difficult to identify the killer. Every clue leads to another mystery in this Tamil crime thriller.

A quirky 29-year-old named Sathya embarks on an unexpected journey of laughter, unlikely friendships, and self-discovery. Through hilarious misadventures and chance encounters, he slowly sees life's bigger picture - its surprises, joys, and second chances.

movie_catalog_history.title: With Love
movie_catalog_history.overview: Sathya reluctantly agrees to a blind date arranged by his sister and meets Monisha. They discover they attended the same school years ago. Bonding over shared memories and old crushes, they reconnect with their past and grow closer.

movie_catalog_history.title: Mr. X
movie_catalog_history.overview: Centers on secret intelligence agency cases involving five major national threats that were thwarted through covert operations.

movie_catalog_history.title: Granny
movie_catalog_history.overview: Granny is an upcoming film directed by Vijaya Kumara, starring Vadivukkarasi, Dhileepan, Singampuli, Gaja Raja, Ananthu Nag, and Aparna in prominent roles.

movie_catalog_history.title: Arjunan Per Paththu
movie_catalog_history.overview: Arjunan, who witnessed his parents being killed by lightning in front of his eyes, cannot bear the shock and arrives in Chennai from his hometown Madurai. Arjunan, who joined a kayalang shop in Chennai, starts to love a woman. Before marrying that woman, he was a worker and wanted to become an entrepreneur. He gave away all the money he had saved up until then and bought an old Tata Ace and married the woman he loved. Arjuna happily starts driving the vehicle, thinking that his life has become as happy as he thought it would be. movie_catalog_history.title: Double Occupancy
movie_catalog_history.overview: Rajini transforms between woman by day and man by night, hiding this gender swap from partners creating tangled complications.

movie_catalog_history.title: Neelira
movie_catalog_history.overview: A wedding eve in 1988 Sri Lanka turns into a hostage standoff when Indian Army soldiers occupy a family's home overnight.

movie_catalog_history.title: Happy Raj
movie_catalog_history.overview: A city romance meets a rural family invasion. What follows is chaos, comedy, and heartfelt moments. The story unfolds as a joyful entertainer that explores love, cultural clashes, and the importance of family bonds.

movie_catalog_history.title: Anthony
movie_catalog_history.overview: Set along the coastal shores of Jaffna, the story follows a fisherman and his family  whose lives are inseparably tied to the sea. As he struggles to balance his responsibilities toward his profession and his family, a tender love story unfolds, shaping his choices and testing his values. Daily life within the fishing community  its hardships, traditions, and unspoken bonds, forms the backdrop of the narrative. When personal desires begin to clash with family expectations, the protagonist is forced to confront sacrifice, loyalty, and the true meaning of love. Through moments of romance, conflict, and emotional depth, the film reveals the  strength of family ties and the resilience of a community that survives by trusting the sea and each other.

movie_catalog_history.title: Nizhal
movie_catalog_history.overview: NIZHAL follows twin sisters Ramya and Saranya. Saranya is a trainee doctor, and Ramya helps their vendor parents. Tragedy strikes when Saranya’s friend Lakshmi is brutally murdered in the hospital lab by Guna, the CEO's son, and his gang. Ramya witnesses the crime and narrowly survives a deadly attack by them. Driven by fury, Saranya seeks vengeance and puts the killers on their deathbeds. Ironically, her lover Raghu takes charge as the sub-inspector for this very case. When Raghu uncovers the truth, a gripping battle begins between law, love, and ultimate justice.
